archetype: Performance Pro with Cinematic Game Mechanics

colors.notes: Tone down the overall color palette. The site should feel like a dark cinematic mountain trail. Checkpoint accents must be used extremely sparingly (only for small marker dots, numbers, or tiny flags). The dominant aesthetic is Monochrome + #FACC15.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter text-white drop-shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight text-white
hierarchy.h4: text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-[#FACC15] tracking-widest uppercase

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Continuous gamified scroll experience. Break free from rigid 'Bootstrap' or grid layouts. Elements should feel mapped onto a winding mountain trail.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. py-32 to py-48 for section transitions to allow parallax and trail line to breathe.

trail_band_pattern.z_index_0: Background Image: Fixed or slow parallax (e.g., y: ['-10%', '10%']). A specific cinematic ride frame.
trail_band_pattern.z_index_10: Gradient Scrim: Absolute inset-0 covering 50% of the screen width (left or right) to guarantee text contrast. Opacity 95% at edge fading to 0% at center.
trail_band_pattern.z_index_20: SVG Trail Line: Continuous weaving line connecting sections. 3px stroke, #FACC15.
trail_band_pattern.z_index_30: Content: Text, hex badges, signposts, overlaying the scrim.
trail_band_pattern.z_index_40: Foreground Parallax: Optional drifting elements (dust particles, low-poly rocks/leaves) moving faster (e.g., y: ['20%', '-30%']).

existing_elements.the_journey_panel: The floating 'THE JOURNEY' progress panel and filling yellow track already exist and MUST STAY. Ensure z-index is higher than background layers.

hero.fixes: Add heavy `scrim_gradient_left` to ensure 'Yuval Cohen', rotating roles, and 'Let's Ride!' CTA have APCA-compliant contrast over the moving scrub-to-scroll canvas. Content strictly left-aligned.

about_me.layout: Capabilities mapped along the weaving trail line like a game skill-tree.

hexagon_badges.style: w-24 h-28 md:w-32 md:h-36 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border-[2px] border-white/10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#FACC15] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(250,204,21,0.3)] hover:-translate-y-2 cursor-pointer
hexagon_badges.iconography: Solid white or #FACC15 line-icons (MTB/trail energy) sizing 32px. Uppercase Unbounded titles inside.

wooden_signposts.style: Dark stylized low-poly panels simulating wood. Border-left 4px using the sparse checkpoint colors. Subtle wood-grain texture or noise overlay. bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md.
wooden_signposts.layout: Positioned alternately on the left and right sides of the central SVG trail line. Connected to the line by a small horizontal branch/dash.

ai_and_innovation.style: Glowing node theme. Darkest background frame with subtle cyan (#22D3EE) ambient glows for AI tools. Tools represented as glowing crystal nodes on the trail.

projects.layout: NOT a bento grid. Parallax floating trail markers along the winding path. Cards on the left scroll slightly faster than cards on the right. Feels like riding past a gallery on the mountain.
projects.card_style: Floating 'polaroid' or rugged trail marker. bg-[#121212]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 p-4 rounded-lg. Image 16:9 at top, Unbounded title + Manrope tags below. Hover scales image and brightens border.

lets_connect.style: Warm ambient glow (yellow/orange). Centered content. Heavy scrim at the bottom fading up.

motion.engine: Framer Motion (useScroll, useTransform) + Lenis for momentum.

mobile.trail_line: Snap SVG line to the left edge (e.g., left: 24px) to act as a vertical timeline. No complex weaving.
mobile.layout: Stack hexagons into a vertical list or a tight 2-column grid. Signposts and project cards stack vertically on the right side of the trail line.
mobile.performance: Disable complex foreground parallax (`z-40`) and heavy blurs on mobile. Keep background images static (`bg-fixed` or standard scrolling) if FPS drops.
mobile.scrims: Increase scrim opacity to 80-90% universally to ensure text readability on smaller screens.

testing.instructions: All interactive elements, buttons, hexagons, signposts, and project cards MUST include a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming.
